name: Orzo with Spinach and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1 cup tightly packed chopped fresh spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the water, orzo, and salt to the saucepan. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook for 13 minutes, or until all liquid is absorbed.
5. Stir in the spinach and remaining ingredients.
Yield: 2 1-cup servings
Per serving: Calories 321 (23% from fat) / Protein 12.8g / Fat 8.1g (Sat 2g, Mono 2.7g, Poly 2.6g) / Carbohydrate 50.3g / Fiber 2.7g / Cholesterol 4mg / Iron 3.9mg / Sodium 289mg / Calcium 114mg
